creator: freebsduser@paradisegreen.co.uk
text:
I am frankly completely baffled by the Drush release numbering.

I had kept the port on the drush-All-versions-3.0.tar.gz
release on the basis that this should work for everybody
whilst the drush-6.x-3.?.tar.gz versions were only for
drupal 6.x users. I had therefore been intending to wait
until drush-All-versions-4.0.tar.gz was out the door
(which since we are at rc1 stage should hopefully not be
too long now).

However, I _am_ open to persuasion by persons less baffled.

-- 
Thomas Sandford [FreeBSD drush port maintainer]
